description: File server SVR-31 disk usage at 87%. Approaching capacity. Archive or expand needed.
resolution: Archived old log files and temporary data. Freed 320GB. Sent capacity report to management for storage expansion planning.

title: SSL certificate expiring soon
description: SSL certificate for api.company.com expires in 14 days. Renewal required to prevent browser warnings.
resolution: Renewed SSL certificate via DigiCert. Deployed to all web servers and load balancers. Certificate monitoring automated for 60-day renewal alerts.

title: VM not starting after maintenance
description: Virtual machine VM-552 fails to boot after scheduled maintenance window. Error: kernel panic at boot.
resolution: Restored VM from last known good snapshot. Identified BIOS misconfiguration during maintenance. Updated boot settings and verified full functionality.

title: Guest user access request
description: External partner from PartnerInc needs guest access to SharePoint project site for bid preparation.
resolution: Created guest account with time-limited access (30 days). Restricted to specific SharePoint site. Sent invite to external partner. Access documented in ITSM.

title: Workflow stuck in pending state
description: Purchase approval workflow in Confluence stuck for 99 requests. Approver receives no notifications.
resolution: Found approver notification email rule misconfigured after mail server migration. Updated notification templates. All pending approvals re-triggered.

title: Storage auto-growth disabled
description: Database ANALYTICSDB log file at 95% capacity with auto-growth disabled. Manual expansion needed.
resolution: Expanded log file by 50GB and re-enabled auto-growth with 20% increment. Added disk space alert at 80% threshold. Resolved without service impact.

title: Intermittent network drops
description: Users in floor 8 of building Tower-B experiencing random network disconnects every 84 minutes.
resolution: Identified faulty AP causing interference on floor. Replaced AP hardware. Adjusted nearby AP power levels. Network drops resolved. Users confirmed stable connection.

title: Load balancer health check failing
description: Load balancer LB-4 marking backend server SVR-06 as unhealthy. Traffic not distributed evenly.
resolution: Resolved health check failure caused by SSL certificate mismatch. Updated load balancer SSL profile. Backend server passing health checks. Traffic balanced correctly.

title: Failed migration rollback needed
description: Schema migration v16.1 on PRODDB01 failed halfway. Partial changes applied. Need clean rollback.
resolution: Executed rollback script to undo partial migration changes. Verified database consistency. Fixed migration script for next attempt. Scheduled retry for weekend.

title: Storage auto-growth disabled
description: Database HRDB log file at 97% capacity with auto-growth disabled. Manual expansion needed.
resolution: Expanded log file by 50GB and re-enabled auto-growth with 20% increment. Added disk space alert at 80% threshold. Resolved without service impact.

title: Email notifications not sending
description: Automated email notifications from Confluence system stopped working. SMTP errors in logs since yesterday.
resolution: SMTP server certificate expired. Renewed certificate and restarted mail relay service. Email notifications resumed. Added certificate expiry monitoring.

title: Privileged access request for DBA
description: DBA team member john.smith needs temporary elevated DB access for weekend maintenance window.
resolution: Granted time-limited privileged access via PAM system. Access auto-expires after maintenance window. All privileged actions logged. Access revoked on schedule.

title: CSV import failing
description: Data import tool fails when processing CSV files larger than 30MB. Memory exception in logs.
resolution: Identified memory constraint in import service. Updated JVM heap size from 512MB to 2GB. CSV imports up to 500MB now working correctly.

title: Database backup failed
description: Nightly backup of FINDB database failed. Backup logs show insufficient disk space on backup server.
resolution: Manual backup triggered after expanding backup storage by 500GB. Verified backup integrity. Automated daily backups re-enabled with increased storage threshold.

title: UPS battery low warning
description: UPS unit in rack R20 reporting battery at 88% charge. Risk of power loss during outage.
resolution: Replaced faulty UPS battery module. Performed load test to confirm 2-hour backup capacity. Scheduled regular quarterly battery health checks.

title: Unauthorized access attempt
description: Multiple failed login attempts (359 in 01:15 mins) on user account alice.chen detected. Account locked.
resolution: Account locked per security policy after threshold reached. Verified user identity via secondary channel. Unlocked and reset credentials. Geo-block rule applied.

title: Database backup failed
description: Nightly backup of PRODDB01 database failed. Backup logs show insufficient disk space on backup server.
resolution: Manual backup triggered after expanding backup storage by 500GB. Verified backup integrity. Automated daily backups re-enabled with increased storage threshold.

title: BGP route flapping detected
description: BGP route flapping detected on ISP link BSNL. Packet loss 88% affecting cloud connectivity.
resolution: Coordinated with ISP to address BGP route instability. ISP applied route dampening and fixed misconfigured peer. Route stabilized. Packet loss back to 0%.

title: Workflow stuck in pending state
description: Purchase approval workflow in Jira stuck for 174 requests. Approver receives no notifications.
resolution: Found approver notification email rule misconfigured after mail server migration. Updated notification templates. All pending approvals re-triggered.

resolution: Generated list of non-compliant accounts. Sent notifications. Enforced immediate password change via Group Policy. Compliance now at 100%.

title: UPS battery low warning
description: UPS unit in rack R18 reporting battery at 90% charge. Risk of power loss during outage.
resolution: Replaced faulty UPS battery module. Performed load test to confirm 2-hour backup capacity. Scheduled regular quarterly battery health checks.

title: Firewall rule review needed
description: Quarterly firewall audit found 134 outdated rules allowing unnecessary inbound traffic on ports 57978, 33459.
resolution: Removed 12 outdated firewall rules after business validation. Applied least-privilege ruleset. Documented changes in change management system.

title: SSO not working for Office 365
description: Single Sign-On to Office 365 failing for users in OU=External OU. SAML assertion error in logs.
resolution: Found SAML attribute mapping broken after directory OU rename. Updated SP configuration with correct OU path. SSO tested and confirmed working for all users.

title: VPN users cannot connect
description: All remote VPN users unable to connect since 19:15. Error: IKE authentication failed. Office WFH impacted.
resolution: Identified expired IKE certificate on VPN concentrator. Renewed certificate and restarted IKE service. All VPN users reconnecting successfully. Total downtime: 45 minutes.

title: Password reset request
description: User bob.wilson locked out of account after 242 failed attempts. Needs password reset with identity verification.
resolution: Verified user identity via manager confirmation and security questions. Reset password and unlocked account. Notified user via alternate contact method.

title: Storage array showing errors
description: NAS storage unit reporting RAID degradation. Drive Drive-D showing I/O errors. Backup jobs are failing.
resolution: Replaced failed drive with hot spare. Initiated RAID rebuild process. ETA for rebuild completion: 4 hours. Monitoring rebuild progress.

title: Server reboot required after patch
description: Patch KB98476025 applied to SRV-61. Server requires reboot to complete patching. Schedule downtime needed.
resolution: Scheduled reboot during off-peak hours at 11 PM. Coordinated with business stakeholders. Reboot completed successfully in 8 minutes.
